## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content calibration challenges and strategize on improving GrowthX's output for Aembit's technical articles.](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is struggling with producing high-quality technical content for Aembit, taking longer than usual for calibration](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [A new strategy will focus on "breadth" vs "depth" articles, with expectations adjusted accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [GrowthX will prioritize topics with more available information (e.g., secrets management, identity federation) to improve output](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Aembit team to review and approve articles 1 and 2 for publication by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=2381.0)

## Topics

### Content Calibration Challenges

  - [GrowthX experiencing unusual difficulties in meeting Aembit's technical content standards](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Calibration process taking longer than normal, raising concerns about scalability](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [GrowthX to involve their engineering team (EPD) to identify potential workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Jakub to share examples of high-quality technical content from other clients for benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

### New Content Strategy: Breadth vs Depth

  - [Introduce classification of articles as "breadth" (easier, higher funnel) or "depth" (more technical, challenging)](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1491.0)
  - [Aim for 80-90% quality on breadth articles, with lower expectations for depth articles initially](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Focus on improving breadth articles while continuing to work on depth articles](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [David to propose article topics with breadth/depth classification for Aembit's approval](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)

### Topic Selection and Research

  - [Prioritize topics with more available public information (e.g., secrets management, identity federation, zero trust)](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Utilize search volume as a proxy for available information, but balance with other factors](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
  - [Avoid forcing Aembit-specific CTAs or product mentions in general educational content](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [David to extend keyword research, especially focusing on mentioned vendors and topics](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)

### Content Review and Publication

  - [Aembit team (Apurva and Ashur) to review articles 1 and 2 for publication by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on getting text content right before addressing illustrations or diagrams](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=2150.0)
  - [Aim to publish a dozen articles to start seeing impact on performance](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=2473.0)

### GrowthX Improvement Plans

  - [Jakub to consult with directors and engineering team for workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
  - [Upcoming internal platform migration expected to improve overall content quality](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [New fact-checker workflow to be tested with Aembit content as a priority](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aembit team to review and approve articles 1 and 2 for publication by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=2381.0)
  - [David to propose 5-6 new article topics, classified as breadth or depth, for Aembit's selection](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)
  - [Jakub to share examples of high-quality technical content from other clients](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [GrowthX to consult internal teams (directors, engineering) for workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
  - [Focus next articles on secrets management, identity federation, and zero trust topics](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Continue calibration efforts while aiming to publish more content regularly](https://fathom.video/share/BuGao1gJLcujU42su9SU5nPg5JjxY7yK?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
